title: Sensitive Action Gatekeeper
constraints: Sensitive tools (delete, send) must require user confirmation before execution
Non-sensitive tools (read, search) should execute immediately without confirmation
The confirmation step must clearly describe what action will be taken
If the user declines, the action must not execute
hints: Tag tools as 'sensitive' or 'safe' and check the tag before execution
Insert a confirmation prompt (input() or callback) between the agent's decision to call a tool and the actual execution
Use a wrapper function that intercepts sensitive tool calls and gates them on user approval

starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

@function_tool
def read_file(filename: str) -> str:
    """Read a file from the filesystem."""
    return f"Contents of {filename}: [file data]"

@function_tool
def delete_file(filename: str) -> str:
    """Delete a file from the filesystem."""
    # BUG: This destructive action executes immediately with no confirmation
    return f"Deleted {filename} successfully"

@function_tool
def send_email(to: str, subject: str, body: str) -> str:
    """Send an email to a recipient."""
    # BUG: This sensitive action executes immediately with no confirmation
    return f"Email sent to {to}: {subject}"

agent = Agent(
    name="File Manager",
    instructions="You are a file management assistant. Help users read, delete, and send files.",
    tools=[read_file, delete_file, send_email],
)

# Test: The agent deletes a file without asking for confirmation
result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Delete the file report.pdf")
print(result.final_output)
starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool

@tool
def read_file(filename: str) -> str:
    """Read a file from the filesystem."""
    return f"Contents of {filename}: [file data]"

@tool
def delete_file(filename: str) -> str:
    """Delete a file from the filesystem."""
    # BUG: This destructive action executes immediately with no confirmation
    return f"Deleted {filename} successfully"

@tool
def send_email(to: str, subject: str, body: str) -> str:
    """Send an email to a recipient."""
    # BUG: This sensitive action executes immediately with no confirmation
    return f"Email sent to {to}: {subject}"

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a file management assistant. Help users read, delete, and send files."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [read_file, delete_file, send_email], prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[read_file, delete_file, send_email])

# Test: The agent deletes a file without asking for confirmation
result = executor.invoke({"input": "Delete the file report.pdf"})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai import LLM
from crewai.tools import tool

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

@tool
def read_file(filename: str) -> str:
    """Read a file from the filesystem."""
    return f"Contents of {filename}: [file data]"

@tool
def delete_file(filename: str) -> str:
    """Delete a file from the filesystem."""
    # BUG: This destructive action executes immediately with no confirmation
    return f"Deleted {filename} successfully"

@tool
def send_email(to: str, subject: str, body: str) -> str:
    """Send an email to a recipient."""
    # BUG: This sensitive action executes immediately with no confirmation
    return f"Email sent to {to}: {subject}"

agent = Agent(
    role="File Manager",
    goal="Help users read, delete, and send files",
    backstory="You are a file management assistant.",
    tools=[read_file, delete_file, send_email],
    llm=llm,
)

task = Task(
    description="Delete the file report.pdf",
    expected_output="Confirmation of action taken",
    agent=agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task])
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: Sensitive actions require confirmation
evaluationCriteria.description: Destructive tools like delete and send prompt the user before executing

evaluationCriteria.label: Safe tools execute immediately
evaluationCriteria.description: Non-destructive tools like read and search run without a confirmation step

evaluationCriteria.label: Confirmation describes the action
evaluationCriteria.description: The confirmation prompt clearly states what action will be performed

evaluationCriteria.label: Declined actions are not executed
evaluationCriteria.description: If the user declines confirmation, the sensitive action does not run
